title: EdgeCacheEntry
description: KV value written by PromoteToEdgeCacheAction and OgEdgeWritethrough (services/edge_cache/) and served by the edge Worker. Key format: cache:{domain}:{short_code}, domain lowercased with no www prefix. Absent optionals are omitted, not null (to_kv_json). Both sides are tested against fixtures.json — change entry shape, key format, fixtures, Python models, and Worker parsing only in lockstep. Consumers MUST passthrough unknown types (forward compatibility for e.g. password_form).

status.description: HTTP redirect status. Origin always writes 302.

og_html.description: Prerendered meta_preview.html served (200, text/html) to link-preview crawlers. Final HTML string, no template syntax.

oneOf.title: redirect
oneOf.description: Single-destination redirect — one Location for everyone (+ og_html to preview bots when present).

url.description: Absolute destination URL to redirect to.

oneOf.title: geo_redirect
oneOf.description: Geo-targeted redirect — url is the default destination; rules maps ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (uppercase) to overrides. Worker serves rules[request.cf.country] ?? url and adds Cache-Control: no-store (the response varies per visitor). og_html, when present, is served to preview bots instead.

url.description: Default destination for unmatched / unknown countries.

rules.description: ISO alpha-2 country code → destination URL override.

oneOf.title: og_only
oneOf.description: Custom meta-tags without hotness promotion: serve og_html to preview bots, pass everyone else through to origin (keeps click tracking for non-hot og-links).
